Bash(node -e "const j=require\('/tmp/new-audit.json'\);const hosts=new Set\(\);for\(const g of j.gaps\){const m=g.remediation.match\(/https?:\\/\\/[^\\s\)\\]'\\"]+/g\)||[];for\(const u of m\){try{hosts.add\(new URL\(u\).host\)}catch{}}};console.log\([...hosts].sort\(\).join\('\\n'\)||'\(no URLs anywhere\)'\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('id=', j.id\); console.log\('composite=', j.composite\); console.log\('scoring_version=', j.scoring_version\); console.log\('dimensions_scored=', j.dimensions_scored, 'dimensions_applicable=', j.dimensions_applicable\); j.dimensions.forEach\(x=>console.log\('  dim'+x.dimension_id, x.dimension_name, 'score='+x.score, 'na='+\(x.na||false\)\)\);}\)")

PowerShell($paths = @\($env:USERPROFILE, "C:\\", "D:\\", "E:\\", "F:\\", "G:\\"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "Searching $p"; Get-ChildItem -Path $p -Recurse -Include "logo-on-black.png","logo-on-white.png" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Force | Select-Object FullName } })

PowerShell(function Get-PngDim\($path\) { $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($path\); $w = [BitConverter]::ToUInt32\($bytes[19..16], 0\); $h = [BitConverter]::ToUInt32\($bytes[23..20], 0\); "${w}x${h}" }; $base = "C:\\Users\\dembo\\OneDrive\\Documents\\Claude\\Projects\\Solo Startup SaaS\\design_handoff_astrant_logo_initial\\assets"; foreach \($f in @\("logo-on-black.png", "logo-on-white.png"\)\) { $p = Join-Path $base $f; Write-Output "${f}: $\(Get-PngDim $p\)" })

PowerShell($src = "C:\\Users\\dembo\\OneDrive\\Documents\\Claude\\Projects\\Solo Startup SaaS\\design_handoff_astrant_logo_initial\\assets"; $dst = "F:\\pharos\\marketing-site\\public\\brand"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dst -Force | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path "$src\\logo-on-black.png" -Destination "$dst\\astrant-mark-dark.png" -Force; Copy-Item -Path "$src\\logo-on-white.png" -Destination "$dst\\astrant-mark-light.png" -Force; Get-ChildItem $dst | Format-Table Name, Length)
Bash(node -e "try{require\('sharp'\);console.log\('sharp available, version:', require\('sharp/package.json'\).version\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('sharp NOT available:', e.code||e.message\)}")
Bash(npx wrangler@latest d1 migrations list pharos_corpus --remote)

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('composite:',d['composite']\); print\('scoring_version:',d['scoring_version']\); print\('dimensions_total:',d['dimensions_total']\); print\('dimensions_applicable:',d['dimensions_applicable']\); print\('Dim 6:',[x for x in d['dimensions'] if x['dimension_id']==6][0]['na'], '-', [x for x in d['dimensions'] if x['dimension_id']==6][0]['sub_checks'][0]['notes'][:120]\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('/tmp/scan.json'\); console.log\('composite:',JSON.stringify\(d.composite\)\); console.log\('scoring_version:',d.scoring_version\); console.log\('dimensions_total:',d.dimensions_total\); console.log\('dimensions_applicable:',d.dimensions_applicable\); const d6=d.dimensions.find\(x=>x.dimension_id===6\); console.log\('Dim 6 na:',d6.na,'name:',d6.dimension_name\); console.log\('Dim 6 sub_check[0].id:',d6.sub_checks[0].id\); console.log\('all dims:', d.dimensions.map\(x=>x.dimension_id+':'+x.score+\(x.na?'\(na\)':''\)\).join\(' '\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('F:/pharos/.tmp-scan.json'\); console.log\('composite:',JSON.stringify\(d.composite\)\); console.log\('scoring_version:',d.scoring_version\); console.log\('dimensions_total:',d.dimensions_total\); console.log\('dimensions_applicable:',d.dimensions_applicable\); const d6=d.dimensions.find\(x=>x.dimension_id===6\); console.log\('Dim 6 na:',d6.na,'score:',d6.score\); console.log\('all dims:', d.dimensions.map\(x=>x.dimension_id+':'+x.score+\(x.na?'\(na\)':''\)\).join\(' '\)\);")
